_publications._publicationTitle: Quantitative MRI of dorsal root ganglion alterations in neurofibromatosis type 1 patients with or without pain.

_contextSnippet: DRG from patients with NF1 (n = 20) showed a significant increase in volume (+176.3%; median 1,736.5 versus 628.4 mm³, p < 0.001) (a), T2 relaxation time (+22.9%; median 118.2 versus 96.2 ms, p = 0.007)
details: Successfully detected DRG enlargement in NF1 patients (+176.3% volume increase, median 1,736.5 vs 628.4 mm³, p < 0.001) and increased T2 relaxation time (+22.9%, median 118.2 vs 96.2 ms, p = 0.007)
